title: 狗狗的音乐舞台:超级狗声
name: diglog
note:
想红吗？整八卦！想火吗？搞绯闻！……当今乐坛就像一个营养不良外加心理不健康的病态年轻人，以自残的方式折磨世界。明星们只想着依靠八卦绯闻来炒作自己，追星族对明星嗓子和脑子的兴趣远远比不上对他们面孔和下半身的关注。真正关注音乐本身的人越来越少。越来越多真正会唱歌的人已经因为失望而闭嘴，而越来越多的人占据舞台却根本不会唱。人人都在想如何喊一嗓子就一夜走红，能够打动人的作品已如凤毛麟角。 

在这个连空气都透着悲观味道的音乐圈，每个人都有自己非音乐的目的，每个人都因为别人的非音乐目的而失望。那么，对人类失望的我们，干脆把希望寄托在人类以外吧！让我们用快乐的方式回击悲观，也许我们不能改变世界，但至少可以愉悦自己！

第一步：从狗狗开始！狗狗们不是为了金钱而歌唱。它们的目的很单纯，我活着，所以我唱。

从现在起，你家的狗狗在我们专业音乐家的帮助下，也可以歌唱了，只要您愿意，我们就可以帮助您的狗狗实现心中的音乐梦想。

title: QQ邮箱开始支持GMAIL收取
name: medowo
note: 今天进QQ邮箱，发现又多了个新功能，收取GMAIL。这是最新支持的吧，也支持收取其他比如163、21CN等等。需要填写POP（接受服务器）的地址。不知道这样的功能会不会影响其他邮件？我一直都用QQ邮箱，因为每次上网都先登陆QQ，QQ邮箱相对来说比较方便，上线就知道有没有新邮件了，与GMAIL相比，QQ邮箱垃圾邮件少了很多。不像GMAIL垃圾邮件都有几千了，找正经的邮件还得翻来翻去，有点闷。我看也应该把所有的邮箱都绑定到QQ上，以免遗漏了重要的东东。不知道GOOGLE会不会借题发挥说影响到GMAIL？当然，我不了解邮箱的盈利。

title: (英文)取代Windows Explorer的5款软件
name: diglog
note:
如果你觉得Windows Explorer的功能不够强大,这里有5款软件供你选择,都是不错的Windows Explorer替代品,包括:Xplorder2,XYplorer,Windows File Explorer ,Universal Explorer,ExplorerXP.........               

Lifehacker recently took a long hard look at Xplorer², a tabbed and efficient alternative with a slew of keyboard shortcuts. Xplorer² is definitely worth a look but, if that doesn’t tickle your fantasy, here’s a short list of other alternatives. 

XYPlorer - XYplorer is a multi-tabbed file manager for Windows, featuring a very powerful file search, versatile preview facilities, a highly customizable interface, and a large array of unique ways to efficiently automate frequently recurring tasks. Free trial available, a license will cost you $29.50.

Windows File Explorer - Windows File Explorer is a file manager for Windows similar to Windows Explorer. But Windows File Explorer uses a different approach: it features many options that Microsoft’s Windows Explorer is missing like image preview and it has two fixed file views side by side (but can be change to a single file view) that is useful when copying many files from folder to folder.

Universal Explorer - With Universal Explorer, you can manage your files (move/copy/paste/delete) quickly and effectively. Plus, you can also VIEW and EDIT almost any file directly in UE with built-in File Viewer Windows! View and Edit text documents, HTML, a wide range of graphic files, programming source code and more. You can even view Microsoft Word and Excel documents without launching Word or Excel.

ExplorerXP - ExplorerXP is a very fast, small, compact and innovative free (for non - commercial use) file manager for Windows 2000/XP. Unlike the regular Windows Explorer, it displays the total size of each folder and allows you to browse multiple folders from a tabbed interface.

title: 获取免费书籍的最好的网站列表 Best Places to Get Free Books
tags: 书籍 免费 下载
name: diglog
note:
此链接列出了可以免费获取(就是下载)书籍的一些网站,不过是英文书籍,但是呢,还是值得收藏一下..          

When we were reviewing 10 of the best online resources for free books, we had a LOT of readers chime in with their own favorites as well.  Thank you for all your helpful contributions!

In fact, we had so many suggestions, we have enough to compile a huge list from them, so here they are in no particular order:

ManyBooks - Free eBooks for your PDA, iPod, or eBook reader - Thanks Tony Bryan & abben 
BookCrossing - Where real books are released into the wild to be found by others - Thanks Engtech 
LibraryElf - The perfect companion to a public library system - Thanks Engtech 
Scribd - Open library to publish and discover documents online - Thanks CincauHangus 
Word Public Library - 400,000 PDF ebooks for download - Thanks Ellen 
Free Tech Books - Free computer science and engineering books (+ lecture notes) - Thanks Ellen 
Bookins - Swap real books with other readers - Thanks Jimbob 
WellToldTales - Free short story podcasts (like audiobooks, but shorter) - Thanks Kevin C. 
Wowio - Public domain, free legitimate copyrighted materials & one of the only with a selection of Comic Books - Thanks Jane and Art Dardia 
BizBooktalk - Free book giveaway contests on Fridays - Thanks Brandon 
MoochMuch - Organize your book lending with your friends - Thanks Bobby 
CHMPDF - A collection of general interest and technical ebooks - Thanks Manish Garg & Brian Di Croce 
Realtime Publishers - free IT eBooks by many of the world’s best authors - Thanks Kevin 
FrugalReader - Trade Books for free - Thanks Brent 
TitleTrader - Swap books, movies, and music - Thanks Brent 
ZunaFish - Trade your old media and books items for new titles you’d rather have - Thanks Brent 
SwapSimple - Swap your used books here - Thanks Brent  
SwapThing - Community of users who swap items including books - Thanks Brent 
BookCart - Internet paperback exchange - Thanks Brent 
SF-Books - Exchange Sci-Fi Books here - Thanks Brent 
PaperbackSwap - Swap books for free - Thanks jane dough, IBelieveInFairies, & Lauren 
PinkMonkey - 450 Study Guides / Booknotes / Online Chapter Summary Notes and Analysis - Thanks Spellchecker 
eBookWorld - Technical resources - Thanks 5n7p3r 
Flaxx - IT and computer books - Thanks tejinder 
Baen Library - Free science fiction and fantasy novels - Thanks lanthus & Glen Davis 
LibraryThing - Social networking and free books - Thanks Michael 
Online Books Page - Facilitates access to books that are freely readable over the Internet - Thanks Aman 
Podiobooks - free audiobooks that you can subscribe to with iTunes or any other podcatcher - Thanks KJToo 
BookRags - Research material in the form of eBooks - Thanks Henry Delany 
Technical Books Online - Old tech books from the “vacuum tube age” of electronics- Thanks obiewiz 
ebookSearchr - Google powered Thanks Rico & Rokker 
Internet Archive - The Intenet indexed - that includes a vast text library - Thanks jojo 
BookYards - Books, videos, education materials- Thanks Victor 
Memoware - Free books for your PDA - Thanks Doug

title: 通过Gmail可远程操控电脑
name: yangkui
note:
GMail Remote Command 可以远程实现关机.运行程序.打开网页,这一切都通过Gmail来实现的.GMail Remote Command 使用说明:
首先在你想要控制的机器上面,点击运行GRC.exe.然后输入你的Gmail邮箱和密码(假设Gmail邮箱是test@gmail.com),点击Sign in,等待….当Sign in变成Stop时候就OK了,一般几秒就登录成功了.最后在另外一台机器打开网页进入...

title: 美媒体：微软该不该收购雅虎的20大理由(组图)
name: diglog
note:
北京时间5月14日消息，随着媒体盛传微软可能斥巨资收购雅虎，著名IT网站eweek.com对微软收购雅虎的利弊进行了分析和权衡，列举了收购和不收购的各十大理由。

　　微软应该收购雅虎的十大理由：

 
 
 


　　一、强化竞争优势---微软收购雅虎是接近Google在搜索领域领先地位的唯一途径。

 
 
 


 二、只是花钱而已---收购雅虎要比买500亿美元的美国储蓄债券要刺激的多。


 
 
 

三、企业文化融合---收购雅虎之后，微软在人们心目中的企业文化氛围可能会因此提升。


 
 
 

四、留住更多人才---收购雅虎可以让微软首席软件设计师雷-奥齐的网络策略继续有用武之地。

 
 
 

五、树立领导风范---微软首席执行官鲍尔默相比于雅虎首席执行官特里-塞梅尔而言是个更好的老板。



 
 
 

六、放松雅虎领导---是时候让杨致远和大卫-费罗停止为了环保进行相扑作秀，去钓钓鱼了。

 
 
 

七、扩大市场份额---收购雅虎之后，微软有能力将整个华盛顿州变为他的地盘，而雅虎连加州都搞不定。



 
 
 

八、改名增强影响---收购雅虎后，微软可以由“Microsoft”改名为“Microsoft!”。



 
 
 

九、雅虎员工套现---微软若收购雅虎，雅虎员工则可以借机套现走人。



 
 
 

    十、获得重要媒体---微软若收购雅虎，只需再多花50亿美元便可收购重量级报纸《华尔街日报》，并因此获得在各大媒体头条刊登该收购事件的机会。
